heading: Omitted
label: 1300m–1 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for restoration of Federal recognition of the tribe and of all rights and privileges of the tribe and its members, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 103–454, title III, § 303108 Stat. 4793Nov. 2, 1994
